description: AppSettings is the Schema for the Cable Map app settings API.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

spec.description: AppSettingsSpec defines Cable Map install-time settings.
spec.title: Specification

allowedRoles.description: Comma-separated EDA role names allowed to use Cable Map. A user is allowed if they hold any listed role; the internal edarole_ prefix is handled automatically. Defaults allow the dedicated Cable Map viewer role and EDA system administrators.
allowedRoles.title: Allowed EDA role(s)
